text: Passing through the glass doors into this space of innovation feels like stepping between worlds—inside, the air buzzes quietly with possibility. As I approach the vibrant R+D wall, I feel a mingling of curiosity and anticipation. Surrounded by screens, books, and bold text, I am reminded of the unending human pursuit to understand, connect, and build. In this modern sanctuary of ideas, I feel both a small participant in a large experiment and a witness to the continual evolution of knowledge.
